author: jtraglia
content: <@106441459183423488> <@477396362917576713> and others, if you have time, please review the [`validate_partial_data_column_sidecar_gossip`](https://github.com/jtraglia/consensus-specs/blob/7d9a1482b14107305c6d7fd8d0948995c6b947fd/specs/fulu/partial-columns/p2p-interface.md#partial-messages-on-data_column_sidecar_subnet_id) function I've created in [this PR](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5246). There are [a bunch of tests](https://github.com/jtraglia/consensus-specs/blob/7d9a1482b14107305c6d7fd8d0948995c6b947fd/tests/core/pyspec/eth_consensus_specs/test/fulu/networking/test_gossip_partial_data_column_sidecar.py) too 😅

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: <@412614104222531604> What would it take for you to deploy Prym's partial columns work to all the Hoodi prysm nodes run by EthPanda ?

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: Note that develop is our release branch so we can't merge to it yet. Can we get the feature branch deployed to Hoodi ?

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: <@1000001410538151996> Also wanted to understand what "unstable" is for LH. Is it your release branch/if not, what's it used for ?

author: aarshshahoffchain
content:
Seeing a lot of these getBlobs timeouts in both prysm-geth & lh-geth logs on blob-devnet-0:

Both LH and Prysm with Geth are unhealthy at https://dora.blob-devnet-0.ethpandaops.io/validators/summary
